Introduction
    Ryûto Kashima is a gloomy high school student. As part of a punishment game, he is forced to confess to Runa Shirakawa, a girl from the top of the school caste who's admired by everyone.

Also known as: You Were Experienced, I Was Not: Our Dating Story
